prompt: The author claims that success is explained only by a hard work. I am absolutely agree with this statement. In our big world each person has some talent. But each talent needs the development to reach success. I think that author means that, when he says that luck has nothing to do with a success. There are many people with the same talents and only the hard work can allow to win in this competition of talents. First and foremost, there are a cases when the person have some talent but not reach a success. My brother was a scientist and he had dreamed about studing in the prestigious foreign university. He was not silly çat all. His inteligence quality score is one hundred and fourty two. But he was lazy and he had not practiced with math. Thus, he had not passed math exam in any foreign university, but it was possible. Last but not the least, some people want to realise their dream so much that any negative circumstances cannot stop it. When my mother was a kid she wanted about be a doctor. Her dream was to be a surgeon, bur she had the disease with hand which made impossible her plans about profession. Surpisingly, now she is a surgeon. Step by step she have been treating her disease and of cource this was a hard work.

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

TASK: When people succeed, it is entirely because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with their success. What is your opinion?
STUDENT_TEXT: The author claims that success is explained only by a hard work. I am absolutely agree with this statement. In our big world each person has some talent. But each talent needs the development to reach success. I think that author means that, when he says that luck has nothing to do with a success. There are many people with the same talents and only the hard work can allow to win in this competition of talents. First and foremost, there are a cases when the person have some talent but not reach a success. My brother was a scientist and he had dreamed about studing in the prestigious foreign university. He was not silly çat all. His inteligence quality score is one hundred and fourty two. But he was lazy and he had not practiced with math. Thus, he had not passed math exam in any foreign university, but it was possible. Last but not the least, some people want to realise their dream so much that any negative circumstances cannot stop it. When my mother was a kid she wanted about be a doctor. Her dream was to be a surgeon, bur she had the disease with hand which made impossible her plans about profession. Surpisingly, now she is a surgeon. Step by step she have been treating her disease and of cource this was a hard work. 
TEXT_TYPE: essay

CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES: [{"ref_id":"sample_07010","cefr_level":"B1","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hey there! I've already finished the first semester, so I can help you. Here are some tips to have more free time:

	* Do tasks when they published, not at the last day. For example you thought that the homework will take one day, and after some time you realize that it is harder and you need to spend more time on it. But because you started earlier you have a lot of days before deadline, so you can do this homework easily.
	* Make plan and stick to it. You should know when you need to do certain homework, so you won't spend time on choosing task.
	* Don't forget to chill sometimes. You need to have at least one hour free time per day.
	* Sleep 7+ hours. If you think, that you can get more time by sleeping less -- you are wrong. You'll be exhausted the whole next day.

By following these tips I was able to pass all exams on score 8 or higher out of 10. Also, I had 1-2 hours free time each day and was able to participate in some olympiads/hackathons each weekends.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"they published,","labels":["Grammar"],"start":133,"end":148},{"text":"at the last day.","labels":["Grammar"],"start":153,"end":169},{"text":"For example you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":170,"end":185},{"text":"will","labels":["Grammar"],"start":212,"end":216},{"text":"realize","labels":["Grammar"],"start":255,"end":262},{"text":"is ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":271,"end":274},{"text":"need","labels":["Grammar"],"start":289,"end":293},{"text":"earlier you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":344,"end":355},{"text":"because","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":324,"end":331},{"text":"deadline","labels":["Grammar"],"start":382,"end":390},{"text":"plan","labels":["Grammar"],"start":436,"end":440},{"text":"homework, so","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":502,"end":514},{"text":"task","labels":["Grammar"],"start":548,"end":552},{"text":" think, that","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":669,"end":681},{"text":"-- you","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":721,"end":727},{"text":"tips I ","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":799,"end":806},{"text":"on score ","labels":["Grammar"],"start":833,"end":842},{"text":"hours free","labels":["Grammar"],"start":881,"end":891},{"text":"weekends","labels":["Grammar"],"start":968,"end":976}],"strengths":[{"text":"For example ","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":170,"end":182},{"text":"Also","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":865,"end":869},{"text":"You should know ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":458,"end":474},{"text":"stick to it","labels":["Lexical choice ✓"],"start":445,"end":456}],"comments":[["since"]]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07100","cefr_level":"B2","task":"When people succeed, it is entirely because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with their success. What is your opinion?","student_text":"In my opinion, success is mostly related with hard work. If you start work on you, youll become better than you were yesterday. This fact is very simple, but on the other hand, it will grow a great person inside you. You shouldnt look to other people because the great enemy of yours is yourself. What is success? Is it having a will to get something or become someone? I think, if you have an opportunity to buy something, it can not be called a success. But if you made that opporutniy from nothing, I can say that you succeed. But how did you get an opportunity? If you only depend on luck, it is possible to get some opportunity, but then nothing can use it but you, even your luck. Hard work is basic. Due to hard work you can get anything you want. Maybe it takes much time, but the result would be sweet. Luck is only a small percent of your success. I dont believe in talant from birth, only hard work. Many people think that money and success is equal, some poeple think that luck and success is equal. In some cases it may work, but in general I believe that equation lays between hard work and success. To sum up, success is not about what you get, its about how you get and what you have done for it. The reason of success is absolutely hard work.
